zh.lifeSummary: 當Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg於1371年9月21日出生在德國貝也纽伦堡時，他的父親Friedrich V von Nuremberg38歲，母親Elisabeth von Sachsen41歲。他於1401年9月18日與Elisabeth Wittelsbach of Bavaria "Electress of Brandenburg"在德國貝也奧培爾巴也爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他去世於1440年9月20日在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫享年68歲，埋葬在可特格希 貝也藍潔利特 安斯巴赫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg于1371年9月21日出生在德国貝也纽伦堡时，他的父亲Friedrich V von Nuremberg38岁，母亲Elisabeth von Sachsen41岁。他于1401年9月18日与Elisabeth Wittelsbach of Bavaria "Electress of Brandenburg"在德国貝也奧培爾巴也爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他去世于1440年9月20日在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫享年68岁，埋葬在可特格希 貝也藍潔利特 安斯巴赫。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Brandenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from Brandenburg, the name of a province, its principal city, and numerous other places.

variants.name: Brandenberg
meanings: German and Swiss German: habitational name from any of several minor places called Brandenberg, for example in Bavaria and Rhineland.
German: in some cases, probably also a variant of   Brandenburg  .

variants.name: Brandenburger
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from Brandenburg (see   Brandenburg  ).

nameMeanings.name: Friedrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

variants.name: Frederick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Friederich
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg was born on 21 September 1371, in Nuremberg, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Friedrich V von Nuremberg, was 38 and his mother, Elisabeth von Sachsen, was 41. He married Elisabeth Wittelsbach of Bavaria "Electress of Brandenburg" on 18 September 1401, in Oberbayern, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 9 daughters. He died on 20 September 1440, in Ansbach, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 68, and was buried in Landgericht Ansbach, Bavaria.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg est né le 21 septembre 1371, à Nürnberg, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Friedrich V von Nuremberg, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth von Sachsen, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth Wittelsbach of Bavaria "Electress of Brandenburg" le 18 septembre 1401, à Oberbayern, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 9 filles. Il est décédé le 20 septembre 1440, à Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Landgericht Ansbach, Königreich Bayern.

de.lifeSummary: Als Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg am 21. September 1371 in Nürnberg, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Friedrich V von Nuremberg 38 und seine Mutter Elisabeth von Sachsen 41. Er hat am 18. September 1401 in Oberbayern, Bayern, Deutschland Elisabeth Wittelsbach of Bavaria "Electress of Brandenburg" geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Er starb am 20. September 1440 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in Landgericht Ansbach, Königreich Bayern begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg è nato il il 21 settembre 1371 nel Nürnberg, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Friedrich V von Nuremberg, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth von Sachsen, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth Wittelsbach of Bavaria "Electress of Brandenburg" il 18 settembre 1401, nel Oberbayern, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 20 settembre 1440, nel Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Landgericht Ansbach, Königreich Bayern.

ja.lifeSummary: Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnbergが1371年9月21日にドイツバイエルンンuルンバーグで生まれた時，父Friedrich V von Nurembergは38歳，母Elisabeth von Sachsenは41歳であった。1401年9月18日にドイツバイエルンオバーバイエルンでElisabeth Wittelsbach of Bavaria "Electress of Brandenburg"と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1440年9月20日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アンスバチで68歳で死去し，クoニグレイチ バイエルンランジャーイチト アンスバチにて埋葬された。

ko.Jena, Weimar, Saxe-Weimar-Eisenach, Germ: 독일 그로ss헤어즈그투 작센-위마-이센악h 크레이스 위마 제나
ko.lifeSummary: Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg(이)가 1371년 9월 21일 독일 베이른 뉘른베르크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Friedrich V von Nuremberg(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth von Sachsen(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1401년 9월 18일 독일 베이른 오버베이른에서 Elisabeth Wittelsbach of Bavaria "Electress of Brandenburg"(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1440년 9월 20일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 앤스바치에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 ko니그레이치 베이른 랜저릭h트 앤스바치에 묻혔다.

pt.21 September 1371–20 SEP 1440: 21 de setembro de 1371–20 de setembro de 1440
pt.Plassenburg, Kulmbach, Bavaria, Germany: Plassenburg, Kulmbach, Landkreis Kulmbach, Bayern, Alemanha
pt.Jena, Weimar, Saxe-Weimar-Eisenach, Germ: Jena, Kreis Weimar, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Alemanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg nasceu em 21 de setembro de 1371, em Nürnberg, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Friedrich V von Nuremberg, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth von Sachsen, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth Wittelsbach of Bavaria "Electress of Brandenburg" em 18 de setembro de 1401, em Oberbayern, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1440, em Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemanha, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Landgericht Ansbach, Königreich Bayern.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg родился 21 сентября 1371 г. в местности Нюрнберг, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Friedrich V von Nuremberg было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth von Sachsen, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth Wittelsbach of Bavaria "Electress of Brandenburg" 18 сентября 1401 г. в местности обирбеиирн, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Он умер 20 сентября 1440 г. в местности ландкрис ансбач, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности ланджиричт ансбач, кoниграич беиирн.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg nació el 21 de septiembre de 1371, en Nürnberg, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Friedrich V von Nuremberg, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Elisabeth von Sachsen, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Elisabeth Wittelsbach of Bavaria "Electress of Brandenburg" el 18 de septiembre de 1401, en Oberbayern, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 20 de septiembre de 1440, en Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Landgericht Ansbach, Königreich Bayern.
